case_title: LEGALMATCH.COM VS. DONALD M. BROWN, JR.

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-11-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-11-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM SERVED JAN-18-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN JR., DONALD M.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN JR., DONALD M. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,375.34 INTEREST, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,440.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN JR., DONALD M. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN JR., DONALD M.
